evals.prompt: Generate the data model for the Citizens Bank fraud demo.
evals.expected_output: citizens-bank-data-model.json with build order, citizens-bank-data-model.md, mapping files for fraud-claims and fraud-escalations indices
assertions: data-model.json is valid JSON with build_order array
fraud-claims index defined with keyword fields for claim_id, claim_type, channel, vendor_id
fraud-escalations index defined (written by agent tool)
semantic_text field present if ELSER scene is in scope
build_order places ELSER endpoint before any semantic_text mapping
demo-critical documents enumerated for the Friday 3pm scenario (VND-0412 claims)
shard counts are reasonable (1 primary for demo-scale indices)

evals.prompt: Build the complete Lowe's data model from the demo script.
evals.expected_output: lowes-data-model.json with 17-step build order, all 7 indices defined with correct field types, ingest pipeline with scripted_upsert logic, semantic_text on knowledge base
assertions: store-transactions defined as data stream (append-only events)
inventory-positions has discrepancy_pct as computed float field
associate-sessions has conversation_history as nested type
build_order places ELSER endpoint before associate-knowledge-base mapping
ingest pipeline includes scripted_upsert logic for inventory-positions
demo-critical documents enumerate specific SKU/store values from script scenarios
